commands.review_summary:
The PR demotes `active_embedded_run` diagnostic recovery skip logs from warn to debug, updates the matching unit expectation and changelog, and also carries stacked Copilot token and DeepSeek/OpenRouter provider fixes.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, though not from a live run in this read-only review. Current main’s active embedded-run recovery branch still logs the observe-only skip and outcome with `diag.warn`, and the linked issue provides matching warn-log samples from OpenClaw 2026.4.29.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer or contributor handling to unstack unrelated provider fixes and add real behavior proof; automation should not fabricate external proof for the contributor.

target.title: fix(diagnostic): demote active_embedded_run recovery skips to debug
